- **Review ID**: `DR-XXX`
- **Feature/CR**: `F-XXX` หรือ `CR-XXX`
- **Review Type**: Business / UX/UI / Architecture / System / Testing / Security
- **Scheduled Date**: YYYY-MM-DD
- **Facilitator**: *(PM or lead)*
- **Design Author**: *(role: name)*

## Review Agenda / วาระการ Review

1. [ ] Business Flow walkthrough (15 min)
2. [ ] UX/UI design walkthrough (20 min)
3. [ ] System/Architecture design walkthrough (30 min)
4. [ ] Security design walkthrough (15 min)
5. [ ] Test strategy review (15 min)
6. [ ] Q&A and action items (15 min)

---
